ResearchCalc.title: Research Calc for Pokémon Sleep
ResearchCalc.description: Using this tool is easy! Simply enter your Research Area and Snorlax strength. You can know how many Pokémon will appear for each sleep score.
ResearchCalc.notice detail1: While Good Sleep Day, don't forget to change the multiplier for the [$t(bonus)]!
ResearchCalc.notice detail2: If you check [$t(sleep twice)], you can know the total number of Pokémon.

own research note: Probabilities after balance adjustments are calculated based on our own research.
rp collection: The ingredient% and skill% are based on RP Collection values.
movie detail: Your subscriptions, likes, comments, and hypes are greatly appreciated!
score is too low: Sleep tracking may fail at <score/>. Recommended at 17 or higher.
tracking title: You can track at your target sleep score by following these steps:
tracking desc1: Check if your $t(strength) matches Pokémon Sleep.
tracking go plus+ title: Use Pokémon GO Plus+ with caution
tracking go plus+ detail: If using Pokémon GO Plus +, sleep tracking may be based on strength from 30 minutes to 1 hour ago.
To avoid this, either try 'cook a meal' or 'start sleep tracking on your smartphone and cancel it immediately'.
Be especially careful if you use whistle just before sleep tracking.
tracking desc2: Select your target [$t(sleep score)] from below.
tracking desc3: After starting sleep tracking in Pokémon Sleep, press the [$t(start tracking)] button.
confirm abort: Are you sure you want to abort tracking?

sleep state.init: Keep the device still for <time/> to enter sleep state.
sleep state.init2: You're likely in sleep state. You may gently shake the device for your desired sleep type <detail/>, but it's safer to avoid shaking for <time/>.
sleep state.normal:
Sleep state entered! You can gently shake the device for your desired sleep type .
Safe to shake for the remaining .
sleep state.finalizing: Approaching the end of tracking. Keep the device still to avoid being marked as awake.
sleep state.aborting: To stop at sleep score <score/>, shake the device once per second for <time/> or carry it with you.
sleep state.aborted: Tracking requires at least 1.5 hours. Do not end tracking for <time/>.
sleep state.finish: Please complete sleep tracking in Pokémon Sleep.

aim dozing: When there is regular vibration, it will be judged as "$t(dozing)". Placing the tracking device near your pillow makes it easier to achieve. If you want to target it intentionally, apply light vibrations to the tracking device once per minute.
aim snoozing: When you toss and turn moderately, it will be judged as "$t(snoozing)". If you want to target it intentionally, apply light vibrations once every 10 minutes.
aim slumbering: When there is little vibration, it will be judged as "$t(slumbering)". Placing the tracking device at a distance makes it easier to achieve. If you want to target it intentionally, avoid giving vibrations as much as possible, but give vibrations once every 6 hours.
strength too low: Snorlax strength should be at least <strength/>.
next strength to get 1 more pokemon: If you gain <strength2/> strength by the second sleep, you will encounter <count2/> Pokémon during the second sleep session (Only when the first sleep score is <score1/>).
border is not fixed: The drowsy power required for the specified number of Pokémon to appear is still being determined. If the specified number of Pokémon appears with different scores or a different amount of power than shown, feel free to report it.
